events.title: NPL Pennsylvania State Championship 2026
events.description:
Registration Link

Current Registered Lifters

Date & Time: 13 June 2026, 0900

Location: Ambition Gym, 6299 PA-309, New Tripoli, PA 18066

 

This event will be held within the Ambition Gym, and spectators will need to purchase a ticket to enter the event (lifters will not).

Sanction: National Powerlifting League

DRUG TESTING(in entered):
Drug testing by urinalysis  All best lifters, not to exceed 10% of the lifters. The remaining 10% are selected by the meet director’s choice.

Eligibility: Eligibility: Any male or female 13 years or older. Lifters must be current NPL members. Good for one year from date of purchase. Must purchase online before the contest.

This is a tested/ non-tested meet. State, National and World records can be set.

Divisions: Open, Junior 13-15, 16-17, 18-19, 20-23, Sub-master 35-39, Master 40-44, 45-49, etc

Weight Classes: Men: 114, 123, 132, 148, 165, 181, 198, 220, 242, 275, 308, 308+ (SHW)

Women: 97, 105, 114, 123, 132, 148, 165, 181, 198, 220, 242, 242+ (SHW)

Rules: One-piece singlet must be worn, as a minimum, for all lifters, and a jockstrap. No compression shorts or spandex allowed.

Sleeves division: requires a one-piece singlet, and allows 4 inch wide buckle or lever belt (No velcro belts or padding on the inside of the belt), wristwraps can be up to 1 meter, and single layer kneesleeves. Over the calf long socks required for the deadlift for all lifters.

Wraps Division: Is Sleeves except it allows up to 3 meter kneewraps for the squat.

Single Ply rules: Single-Ply squat, bench, and deadlift suits only! No velcro straps on the squat/deadlift suit. Velcro is allowed on the bench shirt, but must close the back completely- no open back shirts. No velcro straps allowed on squat or deadlift suit. No support briefs allowed in single ply.

Multi Ply rules: Multi-Ply division allows multi-ply squat, bench shirts and deadlift suits along with open back shirts and Velcro straps for the DL suit.

See NPL rulebook for complete rules.NPL Rulebook

A 30kg bar and collar set will be used for all squat and a 25kg bar and collar set will be used for bench and deadlift. Texas Bars will be brand used.

Schedule:

Early Weigh-in/Gear Check – Friday 6/12 9:00AM-11:00AM evening early weigh-ins will be 4:00PM-6:00PM at the meet venue

**NO SAME DAY WEIGH IN**

Rules Briefing/Warm Ups: Saturday, 8AM

Lifting Begins: Saturday, 9AM

 

Awards:

Open: 1st – 3rd place in each weight class
Junior 13-15, 16-17, 18-19, 20-23: 1st – 3rd place in each weight class/age group
Submaster 35-39: 1st – 3rd place in each weight class/age group
Master 40-44, 45-49, etc.: 1st – 3rd place in each weight class/age group

Best Lifter: Any Division with 5+ lifters will receive an award.

 

Entry Fee: $150 per lifter includes t-shirt, $10 drug test, add $45 if entering additional division (Open + JR = 2 awards)

 

Payment: Payment of entry fees will be done via PayPal. You will be redirected to PayPal to submit your entry after completing your registration details. Entries will not be considered final until your payment has been received.

**REFUND POLICY**
Please take notice that once payments are taken there is a $25 dollar processing fee for a refund. With in 30 days of the event all payments are final there will be no refunds. At all time entries are non transferable to any future events under any circumstances. There is no refund on t-shirts orders at anytime.

 

Registration Deadline: After May 12th, 2026 meet t-shirt will no longer be included with the meet fee.

 

Meet Director: Bobby Bowlin

 

Questions: Please call or text Bobby Bowlin at 610-659-4671 OR send an email to BFGlifting@gmail.com

 

 

**Meet Capped at 60 Lifters**

Meet Director: Bobby Bowlin

Questions: Please call or text Bobby Bowlin at 610-659-4671 OR send an email to BFGlifting@gmail.com

**Meet Capped at 45 Lifters**

events.title: Western Regionals
events.description:
Registration link

NPL 2026 Western Regionals

Full Power-Bench Only-Deadlift Only

Raw-Wraps-Single Ply-Multi Ply

Limited to 60 lifters per day

State and National Records can be set

LOCATION, DATE, AND TIME

Hallmark Resort

744 SW Elizabeth St

Newport, OR 97365

Saturday, June 20, 2026 – All Women and Non-Tested Men

Sunday, June 21, 2026 – Tested Men

Start Time 9am on each day

MEMBERSHIP

NPL Membership is required to compete. You do not need to purchase your membership to register. It must be purchased before you can weigh in. Purchase Membership

RULEBOOK

Please review the rulebook prior to competition

ENTRY FEES, PAYMENTS & REFUNDS

$60 per lifter. $20 for event and age group crossovers

Payment of entry fees will be done via PayPal. You will be redirected to PayPal to submit your entry after completing your registration details. Payment is expected at the time of entry. You will receive an email confirmation after your payment is processed. No entries will be accepted after May 29, 2026.

No refunds or transfers.

WEIGH INS

Saturday Lifters: Friday, June 19, 2026 from 9am to 11am or 4pm to 6:00pm

Sunday Lifters: Saturday, June 20, 2026 from 9am to 11am or 4pm to 6:00pm

HOTEL CODE

Call for reservations and mention the code NPL Powerlifting. You do not have to pay at the time of booking.

MEET DIRECTOR

Peter Martin. Contact at downingsgym@gmail.com or 541-990-3675 for questions

events.title: NPL Meta Mayhem Summer Slam
events.description:
Register Here

Current Lifter

Date & Time: 27 June 2026, 0900

Location: Meta 365 Fitness, 1331 8th ave, Menominee MI, 49858, USA,  (920-857-7456) Meta365FitnessLLC@gmail.com

This event will be held within Meta 365 Fitness and spectators will need to purchase a ticket to enter the event (lifters will not).

Sanction: National Powerlifting League (NPL)  www.npleague.net

Best Overall DOT Men and Women will receive a Cash Prize. Must be 10+ lifters

Tested and Non-Tested Meet

Eligibility: Eligibility: Any male or female 5 years or older. Lifters must be current NPL members. Good for one year from the date of purchase. Must purchase online before the contest.

This is both Tested and non-tested meet. State and National records can be set.

Divisions: Open, Junior 5-12, 13-15, 16-17, 18-19, 20-23, Sub-master 35-39, Master 40-44, 45-49, etc

Weight Classes: Men: 114, 123, 132, 148, 165, 181, 198, 220, 242, 275, 308, 308+ (SHW)

Women: 97, 105, 114, 123, 132, 148, 165, 181, 198, 220, 242, 242+ (SHW)

Rules: One-piece singlet must be worn, as a minimum for all lifters. Underwear must be “V” type legless aka “tighty whities”, or jockstrap. No compression shorts or spandex allowed.

Raw Sleeves: requires a one piece singlet, and allows 4 inch wide buckle or lever belt (No velcro belts or padding on the inside of the belt), wristwraps can be up to 1 meter, and single layer kneesleeves. Over the calf long socks required for the deadlift for all lifters.

Classic Wraps: Is raw except it allows up to 3-meter knee wraps for the squat.

Single Ply rules: Single-Ply squat, bench, and deadlift suits only! No velcro straps on the squat/deadlift suit. Velcro is allowed on the bench shirt, but must close the back completely- no open back shirts. No velcro straps are allowed on squat or deadlift suit. No support briefs allowed in single ply.

Multi Ply rules: Multi-Ply division allows multi-ply squat, bench shirts, and deadlift suits along with open back shirts and Velcro straps for the DL suit.

See NPL rulebook at https://npleague.net/wp-content/uploads/2024/08/new-NPL-Rulebook-July-2024-1.pdf for complete rules.

A 30kg bar and collar set will be used for all squats and a 25kg bar and collar set will be used for bench and deadlift. Texas Bars will be brand used.

Schedule:

Early Weigh-in/Gear Check – Friday 6/26, 9:00AM-11:30AM evening early weigh-ins will be 4:00PM-6:00PM “MUST BE SCHEDULED” at meet venue

**NO SAME DAY WEIGH IN**

Schedule:

Rules Briefing/Warm Ups: Saturday, 8AM

Lifting Begin: Saturday, 9AM

Awards: Saturday ~ 4PM

Awards:

Open: 1st – 3rd place in each weight class
Junior 13-15, 16-17, 18-19, 20-23: 1st – 3rd place in each weight class/age group
Submaster 35-39: 1st – 3rd place in each weight class/age group
Master 40-44, 45-49, etc.: 1st – 3rd place in each weight class/age group

Best Lifter: Any Division with 5+ lifters will receive an award.

Entry Fee: $60 per non-tested lifter, add $30 if entering additional division (Open + Junior = 2 awards)

$15 fee for tested lifters.

Payment: Payment of entry fees will be done via PayPal. You will be redirected to PayPal to submit your entry after completing your registration details. Entries will not be considered final until your payment has been received.

Registration Deadline: May27th, 2026. After this date $20 late fee must be paid to enter.

Meet Director: Aaron Kurz

Questions: Please call or text Aaron Kurz at 920-857-7456 OR send an email to Meta365FitnessLLC@gmail.com

**Meet Capped at 60 Lifters**

events.title: Shikellamy Showdown
events.description:
High School/ Special Olympic Only

Registration 

Current Registered lifters

Date & Time: 11 July 2026 at 08:00AM

Location: Shikellamy High School, 600 Walnut St, Sunbury, PA 17801.

This event will be held within the Shikellamy High School and spectators will need to purchase a ticket to enter the event (lifters will not).

Sanction: National Powerlifting League

Eligibility: Eligibility: male or female 5- 19 years old and a highschool student or Special Olympics (maybe older than 19). Lifters must be current NPL members. Good for one year from the date of purchase. Must purchase online before the contest.

This is a non-tested meet. State and National records can be set.

Divisions: Junior 5-12, 13-15, 16-17, 18-19. Open for Special olympics

Weight Classes: Men: 114, 123, 132, 148, 165, 181, 198, 220, 242, 275, 308, 308+ (SHW)

Women: 97, 105, 114, 123, 132, 148, 165, 181, 198, 198+ (SHW)

Rules: One-piece singlet must be worn, as a minimum for all lifters. Underwear must be “V” type legless aka “tighty whities”, or jockstrap. No compression shorts or spandex allowed.

Raw Sleaves: requires a one piece singlet, and allows 4 inch wide buckle or lever belt (No velcro belts or padding on the inside of the belt), wrist wraps can be up to 1 meter and single layer knee sleeves. Over the calf long socks are required for the deadlift for all lifters

See NPL rulebook at NPL Rulebook for complete rules.

A 30kg bar and collar set will be used for all squat and a 25kg bar and collar set will be used for bench and deadlift.

Schedule:

Early Weigh in/Gear Check – Friday 7/10, 9:00AM-11:00AM evening early weigh ins will be 4:30PM-6:30PM at the meet venue

**NO SAME DAY WEIGH IN**

Rules Briefing/Warm Ups: Saturday, 8AM

Lifting Begins: Saturday, 9AM

Awards:

Open: 1st – 3rd place in each weight class
Junior 13-15, 16-17, 18-19: 1st – 3rd place in each weight class/age group

Best Lifter: Any Division with 5+ lifters will receive an award.

Entry Fee: $20 per lifter, add $10 if entering additional event

Payment: Payment of entry fees will be done via PayPal. You will be redirected to PayPal to submit your entry after completing your registration details. Entries will not be considered final until your payment has been received. **See Refund policy below**

Registration Deadline:  11 June

Meet Director: Bobby Bowlin

Questions: Please call or text Bobby Bowlin at 610-659-4671 OR send an email to BFGlifting@gmail.com
